title: Story Pack: lifecycle traceability delivery slice

prioritization.priority_rationale: The story pack is the bounded delivery handoff that proves the lifecycle slice can move past PRD handoff without losing its traceability discipline.
prioritization.reviewer_handoff: Engineering and QA should confirm the stories are specific enough to implement without inventing post-release scope.

delivery_burden_summary: The slice is bounded to story planning, acceptance readiness, and release readiness, but it still depends on clean linked artifacts and explicit deferred-stage messaging.
ambiguity_notes: The delivery trace should remain item-first and not expand into a broad multi-item planning model.
Launch preparation and outcome review must stay visibly deferred.

stories.title: Extend the item trace into delivery and release readiness
stories.narrative: As a PM, I want ProductOS to keep one canonical item trace through story planning, acceptance readiness, and release readiness so I can inspect downstream readiness without rebuilding the story manually.
testability_notes: The trace should preserve the originating PRD, linked opportunity, and lifecycle snapshots.
The delivery slice should explicitly show what is deferred beyond release readiness.

implementation_context_refs.title: Lifecycle Trace Delivery Handoff
implementation_context_refs.summary: Delivery-boundary notes and release-readiness expectations for the bounded V6 lifecycle slice.
